Week 5 | Persuasive Essay

Persuasive Essay
A persuasive essay, sometimes called an argumentative essay or an argument essay, is a type of writing that attempts to convince the reader to agree with the writer's point of view.

Two groups of people protesting. One group has signs saying 'Yes', the other side 'No.'

Persuasive essays are usually written on topics that have differing opinions. The purpose of a persuasive essay is to persuade the reader to adopt the writer's position on the issue at hand.

Several key elements must be included in a persuasive essay:
